final_prompt.prompt: Create a luxury minimalist brand avatar for “Global Holiday Travel”. The design should be modern, elegant, international, and premium. Focus on a simple globe-inspired icon combined with travel elements such as flight paths, sunrise, ocean waves, or abstract journey lines. Clean centered composition, suitable for Facebook page profile picture, Instagram avatar, and travel agency branding. Use a premium color palette of deep blue, gold, and white. The design should be sleek, refined, and highly recognizable, with smooth clean lines, no complex background, no realistic style, no人物, no excessive decoration. Use a solid background or clean negative space. Overall feel: minimalist, upscale, professional, luxury travel brand logo, high definition.
